mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, notification_type, enabled, create_time, update_time FROM notification_config WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND notification_type = #{notificationType} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification_config (user_id, notification_type, enabled, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{notificationType}, #{enabled}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
